The file `/documents_4/StoreSalesDataStatisticsAnalysisTable1.xlsx` contains the store sales data statistics organized as requested. This Excel spreadsheet provides a comprehensive daily performance report for Shop A throughout April (April 1st to April 30th). The data is organized by weekdays (Monday through Sunday for each of the four weeks) and includes the following key metrics: Sales Target, Tag Price Sales, Actual Sales, Discount Rate, Promotional Activities, Daily Achievement Rate, Monthly Achievement Rate (which reached 85.3% by the end of April against a monthly target of 50,000), Store Information (area and actual efficiency), Customer Data (number of buyers, average transaction value, total items sold, average items per transaction), Financials (purchase amount and gross profit margin), and Environmental Context (weather and temperature). Sales performance varied significantly, with peak actual sales on weekends (e.g., 7,208.2 on Sunday, April 7th), and promotional activities like "Storewide 30-50% off" correlated with higher daily achievement rates. The table provides a clear view of how daily targets, actual performance, and external factors like weather and promotions interact over a full month.
